humanDecisionSummary: Maintainer can read scope, evidence boundary, rollback notes, privacy redaction, and non-execution boundary before any later authorization review.

checklistSections.scope: current-user only; no default-user, machine, or offline-image claim is reviewed in this checklist.
checklistSections.target-identity-redaction: User identity is redacted as <redacted-current-user>; no local profile path or NAS path is present.
checklistSections.evidence-boundary: Evidence is dry-run, mock, and report-only material. It is not real UX evidence and is not approval.
checklistSections.rollback-or-restore-plan: Restore plan names the original exported templates, the dry-run report artifact, and the manual revert owner for a separate authorized run.
checklistSections.privacy-redaction: Private path, account name, and host identity are replaced with placeholders before maintainer review.
checklistSections.reviewer-decision: Maintainer checklist decision is approval-checklist-ready only.
checklistSections.execution-boundary: No execution approval is granted; this checklist cannot authorize or perform restore actions.
